data.title: General Mills appoints new director, updates corporate bylaws
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from General Mills ( (GIS) ).

On January 26, 2026, General Mills appointed Joan L. Bottarini as an independent director to its Board, expanding the Board to twelve members and assigning her to the Audit and Compensation and Talent Committees, with compensation aligned to the company’s standard director pay practices, including an initial grant of restricted stock units. On the same date, the Board amended and restated the company’s by-laws to update procedures and disclosure requirements for director nominations and shareholder proposals at annual meetings, clarify the majority voting provision for contested elections, and implement various administrative and modernizing changes, signaling ongoing refinement of its corporate governance framework for investors and other stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (GIS) stock is a Hold with a $49.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on General Mills stock, see the GIS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GIS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GIS is a Neutral.

General Mills’ overall stock score reflects a stable financial performance and attractive valuation, offset by technical indicators suggesting limited momentum and potential overbought conditions. The earnings call provides a mixed outlook with both positive initiatives and challenges, while the supply chain restructuring introduces additional risks.

To see Spark’s full report on GIS stock, click here.

More about General Mills

General Mills, Inc. is a global consumer packaged goods company operating in the food industry, best known for its portfolio of branded grocery products, including cereals, snacks, baking mixes, and other packaged foods sold through retail and foodservice channels worldwide.

Average Trading Volume: 7,161,407

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $23.81B

data.title: Eastport Critical Metals Begins OTCQB Trading to Broaden U.S. Investor Access
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Penbar Capital Ltd. ( (TSE:EVI) ).

Eastport Critical Metals Corp. has begun trading its common shares on the OTCQB Venture Market in the United States under the symbol “EVIIF,” while maintaining its existing listing on the TSX Venture Exchange under “EVI.” The dual listing is designed to improve visibility and trading access for U.S. investors without issuing new shares, potentially broadening the company’s shareholder base and liquidity as it advances a diversified portfolio of copper, nickel, cobalt, rare earths, uranium and PGE projects in Botswana, one of Africa’s most highly rated mining jurisdictions.

More about Penbar Capital Ltd.

Eastport Critical Metals Corp. is a critical minerals development company focused on advancing five projects in Botswana, with nearly $20 million in cumulative historical and current expenditures. Its flagship Matsitama Copper Project anchors a portfolio that also includes the Selebi East nickel-copper-cobalt project near the historic Selebi Mines, the Semarule rare earth elements project in the Gaborone-Molepolole corridor, the Foley uranium project adjacent to the Letlhakane uranium deposit, and the Keng nickel-copper-PGE project on the northern margin of the Molopo Farms Complex. Operating in Botswana, a top-ranked African mining jurisdiction with a strong regulatory environment and long track record of large-scale mineral development, Eastport is positioned within a jurisdiction that has attracted significant natural resources investment and M&A activity.

Average Trading Volume: 43,788

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Find detailed analytics on EVI stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Sealand Capital Galaxy ( (GB:SCGL) ) has provided an announcement.

Sealand Capital Galaxy has unveiled a strategic overhaul that will concentrate its resources on AI-driven software, SaaS digital management solutions, and computing-power and energy infrastructure, with the aim of building an integrated platform spanning digitalisation, intelligence, computing support and energy assurance. The company plans to anchor its operations in the Asia-Pacific region via dual hubs in Shenzhen and Hong Kong, supplementing its core activities with advisory services for international firms entering China and the UK and selective tech- and AI-focused investments, while also considering board enhancements and potential M&A to support the shift, signalling a bid to strengthen competitiveness and create more sustainable long-term revenue for shareholders under UK regulatory oversight.

data.title: MGE Energy Issues New Senior Notes Under Purchase Agreement
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

MGE Energy ( (MGEE) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On January 22, 2026, MGE issued an aggregate $90 million of unsecured senior notes in three tranches—a $30 million 5.05% Series A due January 31, 2036, a $30 million 5.25% Series B due January 31, 2041, and a $30 million 5.79% Series C due January 31, 2056—under a new Note Purchase Agreement with institutional purchasers. The notes, which are outside MGE’s existing 1998 indenture, carry semiannual interest payments starting July 31, 2026, are optionally redeemable with a make-whole premium (subject to limited maturity-window exceptions), and must be prepaid at par plus accrued interest, but without a premium, following certain change-of-control events tied to ownership of MGE Energy and the company’s investment-grade ratings. The agreement imposes leverage and structural protections, including a cap on the ratio of consolidated indebtedness to total capitalization at 65% and restrictions on issuing priority debt above 20% of consolidated assets, effectively limiting additional secured borrowing and requiring equal and ratable security for these notes if the principal bank credit facilities are ever secured, thereby preserving noteholder protections while providing MGE funding flexibility for capital spending and other corporate obligations.

The most recent analyst rating on (MGEE) stock is a Sell with a $74.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on MGE Energy stock, see the MGEE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on MGEE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, MGEE is a Neutral.

MGE Energy’s overall stock score is driven by its solid financial performance and stable balance sheet, which are the most significant factors. The technical analysis suggests a neutral market sentiment, while the valuation indicates moderate pricing with limited growth potential. The absence of recent earnings call data and corporate events means these factors do not influence the score.

To see Spark’s full report on MGEE stock, click here.

More about MGE Energy

Madison Gas and Electric Company (MGE), a wholly owned subsidiary of MGE Energy, Inc., operates in the regulated utilities sector, providing gas and electric service under long-term capital-intensive investment plans. As a utility issuer in the U.S. debt markets, MGE relies on a mix of unsecured notes and bank credit facilities to fund capital expenditures and support its balance sheet, subject to leverage, priority debt and rating-based covenants that are typical for investment-grade utility borrowers.

Average Trading Volume: 123,873

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: $2.89B

data.title: TwentyFour Income Fund Seeks Block Listing of 30 Million New Shares to Meet Investor Demand
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

TwentyFour Income Fund Ltd GBP ( (GB:TFIF) ) has shared an announcement.

TwentyFour Income Fund Limited has applied to the London Stock Exchange for a block listing of 30 million additional ordinary shares of 1 pence each, with the new shares to be admitted to the FCA’s Official List in the Closed-Ended Investment Funds category and to trading on the LSE’s Main Market. The new shares will be issued to meet investor demand that cannot be satisfied in the secondary market, with proceeds to be invested in line with the fund’s existing investment policy, underscoring both strong demand for the strategy and the company’s intention to deploy fresh capital into its targeted asset-backed securities portfolio; the block listing is expected to become effective on 28 January 2026.

More about TwentyFour Income Fund Ltd GBP

TwentyFour Income Fund Limited is a FTSE 250-listed closed-ended investment company that seeks to generate attractive risk-adjusted returns, primarily through income distributions, by investing in a diversified portfolio of asset-backed securities across the UK, Europe, the US and Australia. The fund targets less liquid, higher-yielding securities, positioning itself as a specialist vehicle for investors seeking enhanced income from structured credit markets.

Average Trading Volume: 1,679,804

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: One Bullion Launches High-Resolution Airborne Surveys in Botswana and Moves to Bolster Market Liquidity
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Imperial Ginseng Products ( (TSE:OBUL) ) just unveiled an announcement.

One Bullion has engaged Xcalibur Smart Mapping to carry out a high-resolution airborne magnetic gradiometer and radiometrics survey over its Vumba and Maitengwe projects in Botswana, covering approximately 16,350 line-kilometres at tight 50-metre line spacing. The program is expected to significantly improve the company’s geological understanding—especially at the large, poorly exposed Maitengwe property—by identifying structural corridors and features that may host mineralization, thereby reducing exploration risk and informing its 2026 drill planning. The surveys are scheduled to begin within weeks and run for about five weeks, with preliminary data due shortly after completion and fully processed results to follow, underpinning a more targeted and capital-efficient exploration push following One Bullion’s recent public listing. In parallel, the company has granted 1,000,000 restricted share units to a director and officer, vesting in 2027, and has retained Independent Trading Group as a market maker to enhance liquidity in its shares on the TSX Venture Exchange, moves that aim to align management incentives and support stronger trading dynamics as exploration momentum accelerates.

More about Imperial Ginseng Products

One Bullion Ltd. is a Vancouver-based gold exploration company listed on the TSX Venture Exchange, holding full ownership of three highly prospective mining areas in Botswana. Its primary focus is advancing early-stage gold projects, including the Vumba and Maitengwe properties in the North-East and Central Districts, respectively, by leveraging modern geophysical techniques to define drill-ready targets and unlock the potential of largely underexplored terrains.

Average Trading Volume: 637,668

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: C$15.07M

Learn more about OBUL stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Desert Control Streamlines Financial Reporting and Updates 2026 Calendar
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Desert Control AS ( (DE:8KT) ) is now available.

Desert Control AS has updated its financial calendar for 2026 and reaffirmed a revised reporting cycle under which it has discontinued quarterly reports in favor of publishing only statutory half-year and full-year financial reports, complemented by regular investor update calls. The company says the move, first outlined alongside its Q3 2025 results, is intended to streamline resource use while maintaining transparency, with key 2026 dates now including an investor call in February, the 2025 annual report in May, the annual general meeting in June, and a half-year 2026 report in August, a change that aligns all published schedules and may alter how investors track the company’s performance throughout the year.

More about Desert Control AS

Desert Control AS (DSRT), based in Sandnes, Norway, operates in the environmental and agritech sector, focusing on soil and water management solutions aimed at improving agricultural productivity and sustainability in arid and semi-arid regions.

Average Trading Volume: 843,913

Current Market Cap: NOK226.3M

data.title: Carnival Files 2025 Annual Report, Reinstates Dividend and Seeks Buyback Authority After Record Year
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Carnival ( (GB:CCL) ) is now available.

Carnival Corporation & plc has filed its joint 2025 Annual Report on Form 10-K with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, confirming that its audited U.S. GAAP financial statements are unchanged from the strong fourth-quarter and full-year results released in December, including record revenue of $26.6 billion, all-time high operating income of $4.5 billion, record bookings and customer deposits, and the completion of a $19 billion refinancing that has cut more than $10 billion of debt since early 2023 and enabled the reinstatement of a quarterly dividend. The cruise giant is also seeking shareholder approval to authorize Carnival plc to repurchase up to 10% of its outstanding ordinary shares, while emphasizing initiatives aimed at long-term value creation—such as targeted marketing underpinned by AI, expansion of exclusive destinations including Celebration Key and additional “Paradise Collection” projects, progress on emissions and food-waste reduction goals, and a proposed unification of its dual-listed structure to streamline governance, cut costs and potentially boost trading liquidity and index inclusion.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:CCL) stock is a Hold with a £2300.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Carnival stock, see the GB:CCL Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GB:CCL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:CCL is a Outperform.

Carnival Corporation’s strong financial recovery and record-breaking earnings performance are the most significant factors driving the score. The company’s strategic initiatives and positive future outlook further enhance its position. However, high leverage and overbought technical indicators present potential risks.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:CCL stock, click here.

More about Carnival

Carnival Corporation & plc is the world’s largest global cruise operator and one of the largest leisure travel companies, with a portfolio of brands including AIDA Cruises, Carnival Cruise Line, Costa Cruises, Cunard, Holland America Line, P&O Cruises, Princess Cruises and Seabourn, serving mass‑market and premium cruise customers worldwide.

data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Prosus ( (NL:PRX) ).

Prosus has provided an update on its ongoing open-ended share repurchase programme involving ordinary shares in both Prosus and its parent Naspers, targeting free-float shareholders. Between 19 and 23 January 2026, the company bought back 1,822,206 Prosus shares at an average price of €51.0528, for a total consideration of about €93 million, underscoring management’s continued capital allocation focus and potential support for earnings per share and valuation as the group seeks to reinforce its market positioning across its global technology and ecommerce portfolio.

More about Prosus

Prosus is a global technology investor and operator focused on building local ecommerce champions in growth markets, serving around 2 billion customers worldwide. Its portfolio spans more than 100 companies with leading positions in food delivery, online classifieds and fintech, complemented by Prosus Ventures’ investments in AI, social and ecommerce platforms, B2B software, logistics, health, blockchain, agriculture and other emerging technology sectors.

data.title: Ganfeng Lithium Signals 2025 Return to Profit on Fair Value Gains and Investment Income
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Ganfeng Lithium Co ( (HK:1772) ) is now available.

Ganfeng Lithium Group has issued a positive profit alert, forecasting that for the twelve months ended 31 December 2025 it will swing from a net loss of about RMB2.07 billion a year earlier to a net profit attributable to shareholders of between RMB1.1 billion and RMB1.65 billion, with basic earnings per share expected to reach RMB0.55–0.82 versus a loss per share previously. The improvement is driven mainly by substantial non-recurring gains, including around RMB1.03 billion in fair value gains from its stake in Pilbara Minerals after risk-management hedging, and investment income from partially divesting a stake in subsidiary Shenzhen Yichu Shuzhi Energy Group and bringing in strategic investors, offset in part by fair value losses on convertible bonds amid a sharp rise in the company’s share price and new impairment provisions. While the company also expects a marked narrowing of its underlying net loss after non-recurring items, it cautioned that the figures are based on preliminary unaudited estimates under Chinese accounting standards, with final audited 2025 results due by the end of March 2026, and urged investors to exercise caution in trading its shares.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1772) stock is a Hold with a HK$72.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ganfeng Lithium Co stock, see the HK:1772 Stock Forecast page.

More about Ganfeng Lithium Co

Ganfeng Lithium Group Co., Ltd., a Hong Kong–listed joint stock company incorporated in the People’s Republic of China, operates in the lithium industry, producing and investing in lithium resources and related new-energy materials for battery and energy-storage markets worldwide.

Average Trading Volume: 22,657,689

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$160.9B
